cartridges_missing_65537.body: The cartridges indicated are either missing, undetected, or incorrectly installed. Make sure the cartridges are installed correctly and that the tape covering the nozzles has been removed. If the problem continues, try restarting the printer.

cartridge_problem_65542.body: The indicated cartridges are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the cartridges.

incompatible_cartridges_65543.body:
The indicated cartridges will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported cartridges.

See the label in your printer or visit HP Support <hp.com/support> for supported cartridges.

use_setup_cartridges_65590.body:
To complete printer setup, you must install the cartridges labeled SETUP that shipped with the printer. After printer setup is complete, the printer can use regular cartridges.

If there is an issue with a SETUP cartridge, contact support.

do_not_use_setup_cartridges_65591.body: After setup has been completed, the cartridges labeled SETUP can no longer be used. Install non-SETUP cartridges.

hp_protected_cartridges_installed_65612.body: The indicated cartridges can only be used in the printer that initially protected these cartridges using the HP Cartridge Protection feature, and must be replaced.

cartridge_problem_65675.body:
The indicated cartridges are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the cartridges.

For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, please contact HP Instant Ink Support.

incompatible_cartridges_65676.body:
The indicated cartridges will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported cartridges.

See the label in your printer or visit HP Support <hp.com/support> for supported cartridges. For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, please contact HP Instant Ink Support.

do_not_use_setup_cartridges_65688.body:
After setup has been completed, the cartridges labeled SETUP can no longer be used. Install non-SETUP cartridges.
For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, please contact HP Instant Ink Support.

cartridges_missing_65690.body:
The indicated cartridges are missing or damaged. Please replace any missing cartridges as soon as possible to avoid print quality issues and possible extra usage and/or damage to the print system. 
For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, please contact HP Instant Ink Support.

hp_protected_cartridges_installed_65694.body: Replace the indicated cartridges. They have been protected by HP Cartridge Protection and can only be used in the printer that initially protected them.

cartridges_require_hp_instant_ink_enroll.body:
The indicated cartridges can only be used in a printer that is currently enrolled in HP Instant Ink. 

To enroll this printer in HP Instant Ink or if you believe your printer should accept these cartridges, visit www.hpinstantink.com

cartridges_missing_65769.body: The cartridges indicated are either missing, undetected, or incorrectly installed. Make sure the cartridges are installed correctly and that the tape covering the nozzles has been removed. If the problem continues, try restarting the printer.

used_hp_instant_ink_cartridges_65773.body:
The indicated cartridges are not compatible with your printer. This error can occur if you install an HP Instant Ink cartridge into a printer that has not been enrolled in the HP Instant Ink program. It can also occur if the HP Instant Ink cartridge was previously used in a different printer enrolled in the HP Instant Ink program. For more information, visit the HP Instant Ink program website.
To continue printing, replace the indicated cartridges.

cartridge_or_account_issue_66175.body:
There is an issue with either the installed cartridges or your account payment method. You will be unable to print until the issue is resolved. 

For more details, check the printer control panel if it has one. Or sign in to your HP account at either hpsmart.com or hpsmart.com/admin for information.

Typical causes of this issue:
• Instant Ink subscription cartridges only work with an active subscription.
• HP All-In Plan printers require an active subscription.
• HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

cartridges_missing_66262.body:
Cartridges appear to be missing. If cartridges are installed, check that the plastic tape covering  the ink nozzles has been removed.
If you have an HP+ printer, it requires Original HP cartridges.
If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, and you don't have replacement cartridges, contact HP Instant Ink support.

cartridge_problem_66277.body:
The indicated cartridges are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

cartridge_problem_66278.body:
The indicated cartridges are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

Your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, and if you don't have a replacement cartridge, contact HP Instant Ink support.

cartridge_problem_66279.body:
The indicated cartridges are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the cartridges.

Your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, and if you don't have a replacement cartridge, contact HP Instant Ink support.

incompatible_cartridges_66283.body:
The indicated cartridges will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported cartridges.

See the label in your printer or visit hp.com/support for supported cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

incompatible_cartridges_66284.body:
The indicated cartridges will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported cartridges.

See the label in your printer or visit hp.com/support for supported cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, contact HP Instant Ink Support.

incompatible_cartridges_66285.body:
The indicated cartridges will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported cartridges.

See the label in your printer or visit hp.com/support for supported cartridges.

For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, contact HP Instant Ink Support.

cartridges_rejected_66293.body:
The indicated cartridges have been identified as used or counterfeit. 

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges. Replace the non-original cartridges to continue printing.

use_setup_cartridges_66297.body: Use SETUP cartridges that came with your printer.

do_not_use_setup_cartridges_66298.body: SETUP cartridges cannot be used after the device has been initialized. Remove and install non-SETUP cartridges.

do_not_use_setup_cartridges_66299.body:
SETUP cartridges cannot be used after the device has been initialized. Remove and install non-SETUP cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

do_not_use_setup_cartridges_66300.body:
SETUP cartridges cannot be used after the device has been initialized. Remove and install non-SETUP cartridges.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

hp_protected_cartridges_installed_66304.body:
The indicated cartridges are HP Protected cartridges which can only be used in the printer that initially protected them. The cartridges must be replaced.

HP+ printers require Original HP cartridges.

hp_protected_cartridges_installed_66305.body:
The indicated cartridges are HP Protected cartridges which can only be used in the printer that initially protected them. The cartridges must be replaced.

Your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, and if you don't have a replacement cartridge, contact HP Instant Ink support.

hp_instant_ink_66315.body:
The indicated cartridges cannot be used until printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink.

If you believe you should be enrolled, contact HP Instant Ink support.

non_hp_circuitry_detected_66341.body: The indicated cartridges have been blocked by the printer firmware because they contain non-HP circuitry. This printer is intended to work only with new or reused cartridges that have new or reused HP circuitry. Replace the indicated cartridges to continue printing. For more information, go to www.hp.com/learn/ds.

cartridges_in_wrong_slots_65544.body: The indicated cartridges are installed in the wrong slots. Reinsert them into the correct slots.

hp_instant_ink_65846.body: Only one set of HP Instant Ink Ready cartridges can be used in a printer. Remove and replace with other cartridges.

cartridges_in_wrong_slot_66286.body: The indicated cartridges are installed in the wrong slots. Reinsert them into the correct slots.

non_hp_chip_detected_66339.body: The indicated cartridges have been blocked by the printer firmware because they contain a non-HP chip. This printer is intended to work only with new or reused cartridges that have a new or reused HP chip. Replace the indicated cartridges to continue printing. For more information, go to www.hp.com/learn/ds.

alignment_error_66564.body:
An error occurred during cartridge alignment.

Remove and securely reinsert the indicated cartridges. If the problem persists, replace the cartridges.

nonhp_chip_detected_66339.body: The indicated cartridges have been blocked by the printer firmware because they contain a non-HP chip. This printer is intended to work only with new or reused cartridges that have a new or reused HP chip. Replace the indicated cartridges to continue printing. For more information, go to www.hp.com/learn/ds.

nonhp_circuitry_detected_66341.body: The indicated cartridges have been blocked by the printer firmware because they contain non-HP circuitry. This printer is intended to work only with new or reused cartridges that have new or reused HP circuitry. Replace the indicated cartridges to continue printing. For more information, go to www.hp.com/learn/ds.

fill_tanks_66019.body: The indicated tanks do not have enough ink to continue printing without risk of damage. Fill the indicated tanks now to continue printing.

incompatible_printheads_66213.body:
The indicated printheads will not work in this printer. Replace them with supported printheads.

Visit HP Support <hp.com/support> for help with obtaining supported printheads.

printheads_missing_66207.body: The indicated printheads appear to be missing. Remove and securely reinsert the printheads, making sure that the plastic tape covering the ink nozzles has been removed.

alignment_is_not_finished_65571.body:
The alignment procedure requires you to scan the page that is automatically printed, and cannot be interrupted by a print job.

To continue the alignment procedure, cancel the print job. Place the printed page on the glass and press the Black Copy button to complete the alignment.

To continue the print job instead of the alignment procedure, cancel the alignment procedure.

print_head_problem_66211.body: The indicated printheads are not communicating correctly with the printer. If this problem persists, replace the printheads.

missing_or_failed_printheads_65536.body:
The printhead appears to be missing, not detected, or incorrectly installed.
Reinstall the printhead. If the problem persists, contact support.

cartridges_depleted_65539.body:
The depleted cartridges must be replaced to resume printing. HP recommends that you do not remove a cartridge until a replacement is ready to install.

Cartridges can be recycled. Visit  [hyperlink] www.hp.com/recycle to learn more about HP's recycling programs.

printer_failure_65541.body: There is a problem with the printer or print system.Turn off the printer, unplug and then plug in the power cord, and then turn on the printer again. If the problem persists, contact support.

paper_too_short_to_auto_duplex_65572.body:
The printer only supports 2-sided printing for certain paper sizes. Please load longer paper.

If supported, you can manually duplex shorter paper by selecting "manual duplex" or "print odd pages" and "print even pages" in your software application.

problem_with_print_system_65599.body:
Please remove the cartridges and examine them for any sign of leaks. If any cartridges have leaks, contact HP. Do not use cartridges that are leaking.
If there are no leaks, re-install cartridges and close the printer cover.

Turn the printer off then on again.

If you get this message a second time, contact support.

cartridge_door_open_65725.body: Close the open door or cover to contnue printing.

supply_system_problem_65800.body:
There is a problem with the supply system.
Try replacing the indicated cartridges with different, non-empty, cartridges. If the problem persists, contact support.

printhead_failure_66209.body: At least one of the printheads has a problem. Check the printheads to make sure they are installed correctly and that the plastic tape covering the nozzles has been removed.

hp_protected_printheads_installed_66230.body: The indicated printheads can only be used in the printer that initially protected these printheads using the HP Printhead Protection feature, and must be replaced.

supply_problem_66038.body:
The indicated supplies are not communicating correctly with the printer.

Try reinstalling the supplies. If this problem persists, replace the supplies to continue printing.

unauthorized_cartridges_65926.body:
An administrator has configured this printer to only use original HP cartridges. Replace the indicated cartridges.
If you believe you purchased Original HP cartridges, visit us at www.hp.com/go/anticounterfeit for more information or to report fraud.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_installed.body:
The indicated cartridges are used or counterfeit.

Any printer repair required as a result of using these cartridges is not covered under warranty. Supply status and features depending on cartridge status might not be available. 

If you believe you purchased Original HP cartridges, visit the HP Anti-Counterfeit website (www.hp.com/go/anticounterfeit) for more information or to report fraud. 
 
See the printer control panel for more information.

fill_tanks_66333.body: Fill the indicated tanks now to continue printing. If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should already have a replacement bottle.
